mapper.sql: question_id, question_content, question_image_base64, option_1, option_2, option_3, option_4, option_5, option_6, option_7, option_8, answer_content, answer_source, question_year, question_source, correct_rate, question_status, created_time, updated_time

q.question_id, q.question_content, q.question_image_base64, q.option_1, q.option_2, q.option_3, q.option_4, q.option_5, q.option_6, q.option_7, q.option_8, q.answer_content, q.answer_source, q.question_year, q.question_source, q.correct_rate, q.question_status, q.created_time, q.updated_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM question WHERE question_id = #{questionId} AND question_status = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM question WHERE ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT FROM question WHERE ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT #{size}
SELECT FROM question WHERE ORDER BY question_id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
